anti_patterns.title: Generic SaaS grid replaces a brand world
anti_patterns.do_not: Substitute an interchangeable feature-card grid for a distinct brand story, material, or point of view.

good_bad.good: Navigation and imagery establish a recognizable world before routes into the offer.
good_bad.bad: Six identical feature cards could belong to any software company.

anti_patterns.title: Interchangeable stock imagery
anti_patterns.do_not: Use images that could describe any competitor instead of the company's product, people, or material reality.

anti_patterns.title: Primary CTA repeated as pressure
anti_patterns.do_not: Repeat the same primary CTA so often that it overwhelms the brand narrative and meaningful routes.
